name: Ridiculously Easy Lentil Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the lentils and water to a boil in a large soup pot.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until the lentils have cooked for about 40 minutes.
3. In a separate pan, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic (to 5 cloves) in olive oil until the onion is soft.
4. Add the onion mixture, salt, and plenty of black pepper to the soup pot.
5. Simmer for another 30 minutes or so.
6. Just before serving, add about half of the lemon juice.
7. Taste and adjust with more lemon juice if desired, along with additional salt and/or pepper to your liking.
8. Serve the very simple and soothing lentil soup.
